name: AltText.ai API
description:
### How to Use the AltText.ai API
The AltText.ai API is a set of REST endpoints that accept `JSON`, and in some cases `multipart/form-data`, requests.

#### API Endpoint:
All API requests go to our API endpoint: `https://alttext.ai/api/v1`

#### Authentication via API Key
Every API call is authenticated using an API key sent in the `X-API-Key` request header.

#### Rate Limiting
Some API calls may be rate-limited. If rate limits are reached, you will receive a `429 Too Many Requests` response.
See the specific request details to find out if rate limiting is implemented for the request.

#### Language Support
The API supports generating alt text in multiple languages. You can request alt text in one or more languages by using the `lang` parameter.

- Request multiple languages by providing a comma-separated string (e.g., `en,fr,es`)
- Each additional language beyond the first consumes one translation credit per image
- If not specified, the account's default language will be used (usually English)
- **Note**: The `gpt_prompt` and `keywords` parameters must be provided in English, even when requesting translations

##### Example Request:
```
curl -X GET "https://alttext.ai/api/v1/images/your-asset-id" \
  -H "X-API-Key: your-api-key" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"lang": "en,es,fr"}'
```

You can create your API key by going to the <ins>[API Keys](https://alttext.ai/account/api_keys)</ins> section of your account.
